3171150.name: Word Turtle Island Demo
3171150.description:
Demo of Word Turtle Island has:

  • Two battle gates to survive nature dungeons while rescuing books and readers
  • Entering a battle gate, you get all 4 difficulty choices to give your Battle Promise. Play it safe or play it risky to get more loot when you return from battle successfully.
  • Smaller limited section to explore the library home base a.k.a. the book sanctuary where you can tend bookshelves and get drops
  • Limited player levels
  • Limited word weapon and powers levels
  • Beginning tutorial level
